name: jianghu-local
description: 江湖 — 本地 AI 数字组织生态系统：天机阁、临时帮派、弟子、议事堂、钱庄、藏经阁。
author: 江湖 contributors

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:mcp && npm run build:ui
scripts.kill:dev-runtime: npm run kill:dev-ports && npm run kill:jianghu-runtime
scripts.dev:room: sh -c 'npm run kill:dev-runtime && export COMPANY_DATA_DIR=$PWD/.company-local-dev COMPANY_SKIP_MCP_REGISTER=1; npm run build:mcp && npm run build:ui && node scripts/dev-server.js --port 4700'
scripts.dev:room:isolated: sh -c 'npm run kill:dev-runtime && export COMPANY_DATA_DIR=$PWD/.company-local-dev COMPANY_SKIP_MCP_REGISTER=1; npm run build:mcp && npm run build:ui && node scripts/dev-server.js --port 4700'
scripts.dev:room:shared: npm run kill:dev-runtime && npm run build:mcp && npm run build:ui && node scripts/dev-server.js
scripts.dev:cloud: node -e "console.log('本项目默认本地运行。请使用 npm run dev:room。')"
scripts.dev:cloud:win: node -e "console.log('本项目默认本地运行。请使用 npm run dev:room:win。')"
scripts.test:quick: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npx playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:fast: npm run build:fast && npx playwright test --project=chromium --retries=0
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build:fast && npx playwright test --retries=0 e2e/jianghu-smoke.test.ts e2e/verify-no-popups.spec.ts e2e/verify-no-popups-detailed.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build && npx playwright test e2e/ui.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:setup: npm run build && npx playwright test e2e/setup-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:setup:headed: npm run build && npx playwright test e2e/setup-flow.test.ts --headed --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:providers: npm run build && npx playwright test e2e/provider-flows.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:demo: npm run build && npx playwright test --project=demo
